name: langfuse-noop-tracer
description: Langfuse tracer with no-op fallback: Import langfuse at runtime only when credentials present, use global variable for test patching, silently swallow exceptions to avoid breaking runs

name: tracer-orchestrator-wiring
description: Tracer wired into Orchestrator as optional param: Orchestrator.__init__() accepts tracer: Tracer | None = None. run() calls trace_run() before the state loop, wraps each handler call with span()/end_span(), and calls end_trace() after terminal state. No-op when tracer is None. CLI instantiates Tracer() (no-op without env vars) and passes to Orchestrator.
